ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date when the country's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date when the data source was updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "source_reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source at the time of collection (1-10) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (1-10) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  "data_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was recorded */,
  "infected" INTEGER /* Number of infected cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source where the case data was obtained */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Testing rate (number of tests conducted per 1,000 people) */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate (number of hospitalizations per 1,000 cases) */,
  "icu_rate" REAL /* ICU rate (number of ICU admissions per 1,000 cases) */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate (deaths per 100,000 population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was updated */,
  "infected_update" INTEGER /* Update in infected cases */,
  "deaths_update" INTEGER /* Update in deaths */,
  "recovered_update" INTEGER /* Update in recoveries */,
  "active_update" INTEGER /* Update in active cases */,
  "vaccination_rate_update" REAL /* Update in vaccination rate */,
  "testing_rate_update" REAL /* Update in testing rate */,
  "hospitalization_rate_update" REAL /* Update in hospitalization rate */,
  "icu_rate_update" REAL /* Update in ICU rate */,
  "mortality_rate_update" REAL /* Update in mortality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., predictive modeling, data visualization) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the analysis (1-10) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the methodology used in the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the results */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* List of data source IDs used in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, research institute, government agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI (Digital Object Identifier) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the publication is open access (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requester */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., cases, recoveries) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status of the request */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* List of data source IDs requested */,
  "data_quality_requirements" TEXT /* Specific data quality requirements for the request */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the request will be completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the shared data file */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* List of data source IDs shared */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the shared data (1-10) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the shared data file in bytes */,
  "data_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)
